title: Issues with Monday Automation

posts.author: BradleyG (Bradley Green)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been experiencing recurring issues with Monday’s automations not functioning as expected or I can’t even create it for a standard request, which has required me to rely on Autoboost as a workaround (Which I cannot get at this moment). One simple feature I wanted was just to copy over a formula column with its data into another column, This raises a couple of concerns:

  1. Shouldn’t some of these automation capabilities be standard within Monday? It seems counterintuitive to require an external app for fundamental automation needs.
  2. The additional dependency on Autoboost adds complexity and potential risks, such as integration issues or additional costs.
